amendment_note: Protocol v2.1 retains v2's fixed observation scaling, action mapping, reward, termination and held-out isolation. It reclassifies Gate-1 compound altitude failure as unlearned hover-center control insufficiency rather than unsafe exploration, introduces the same training-only scenario curriculum for Direct and Residual, and ramps mixer-space behavior noise only after actor updates begin.
research_question: Under identical nonprivileged policy inputs derived from observable flight state and hidden time-varying disturbances, does a PID residual prior improve TD3 safety, sample efficiency, and circular-tracking robustness?

observation.shared_policy_observation_contract: Direct TD3 and Residual TD3 both receive eight history frames followed by the current four-dimensional RPM command from the same frozen PID at the same control instant. This controller-derived feature is a deterministic function of permitted measurements, reference, and ordinary PID memory; it is not disturbance truth. It must not be provided to only one TD3 mode.

normalization.rule: position/reference/error divided by 2 m; velocity/reference/error by 3 m/s; attitude by pi; angular velocity by 10 rad/s; last policy action unchanged; every applied-RPM and PID-RPM field divided by MAX_RPM

training_curriculum.scope: training sampling only; validation scenarios and seed partitions unchanged

disturbance.sample_time_domain: finite time_sec in [0.0, horizon_sec]; values outside the closed interval raise ValueError
disturbance.knot_interval_distribution: independent continuous uniform on the profile interval
disturbance.knot_coverage: first knot at 0.0; draw full intervals until the final bracketing knot is greater than or equal to horizon_sec; never clip the last interval
disturbance.standard_knot_semantics: constant zero-wind/unit-efficiency value; no stochastic knot schedule required
disturbance.initial_stochastic_knot: draw one profile-distributed value at time 0.0
disturbance.wind_vector_distribution: uniform by area in the horizontal disk: radius = limit * sqrt(U[0,1)), angle = U[0,2*pi)
disturbance.efficiency_distribution: thrust and torque efficiencies are independent continuous-uniform draws within the profile range at every knot
disturbance.interpolation: componentwise linear interpolation between adjacent pre-generated knots
disturbance.rng_scope: one local numpy.random.Generator per process; construction and sampling never mutate global NumPy RNG state

simulation.disturbance_substep_clock: sample at substep_index / pybullet_frequency_hz before applying each physics substep; first sample is at 0.0 seconds
simulation.post_step_state_time: after the final substep, reference/reward/termination/info use completed_substep_count / pybullet_frequency_hz
simulation.wind_force_model: incremental quadratic drag relative to the simulator's still-air PYB baseline: -0.5*rho*CDA*(norm(v-w)*(v-w) - norm(v)*v)
simulation.wind_force_application_position: live base world position queried from PyBullet at every substep
simulation.standard_extra_wind_force: exactly zero because w = 0 in the incremental model
simulation.actuator_efficiency_model: one scalar thrust efficiency multiplies KF*rpm^2 for all four motors and one scalar torque efficiency multiplies KM*rpm^2 for all four motors at each substep

termination.helper_semantics: one pure current-state helper is called independently by reward and termination
termination.boundary_semantics: failure occurs only when a max is strictly exceeded or a min is strictly undershot

reward.terminal_semantics: The failure reason is computed from the current state by one pure helper. Reward and termination call the same helper, so the penalty is applied on the terminal transition itself.

td3.warmup_action_source: 0-2000: Direct bounded smooth collective-only RPM exploration (zero torque), Residual bounded smooth residual exploration on PID; never action_space.sample(). After actor updates begin, correlated mixer-space differential exploration ramps linearly to its calibrated value by step 5000.
td3.direct_final_actor_initialization: uniform[-0.003,0.003] weight and zero bias; synchronize actor_target
td3.residual_final_actor_initialization: zero weight and zero bias; synchronize actor_target

stage_a.standard_gate: residual standard failure_count == 0 AND residual standard steady_position_rmse_success_only <= 1.10 * pid standard steady_position_rmse_success_only
stage_a.compound_improvement: residual failure_count <= comparator failure_count - 1 OR (failure_count equal AND residual failure_penalized_horizon_error <= 0.95 * comparator failure_penalized_horizon_error)
